IT-MICROSOFT TEAMS – ONLINE CLASSES AND ACADEMIC EVENTS

Access

Web/Desktop:

teams.microsoft.com

Mobile:

Download the

Microsoft Teams

app for iOS/Android and log in with your KHAS e-mail address.

What Does It Offer?

Class & Meeting:

Scheduling from calendar, one-click join.

Rooms:

Small group work with Breakout Rooms.

Recording:

Recording of necessary sessions and sharing with authorized persons.

Corporate Security:

Authenticated users, permission-controlled access.

Step-by-Step Usage

Based on your role

Student

Academic Staff

Login:

Sign in with your KHAS e-mail.

Reach the class:

Open the lecture/seminar link in the calendar.

Join:

Microphone off, camera optional.

Interaction:

Use raise hand or chat channel.

Plan:

Create a meeting from the calendar, share the invitation with students.

Set options:

Edit lobby, presentation, and attendance permissions.

Rooms:

Manage subgroups with breakout rooms.

Record:

Start Recording

→ recordings are stored in OneDrive/SharePoint.

Usage Tips

Based on your role

Student

Academic Staff

Test your microphone/camera before joining.

If there is a connection issue, try a different browser/network; keep VPN off.

If there is an issue accessing the recording, inform the instructor.

Set attendance and presentation permissions before the meeting starts.

Check recording permissions in OneDrive/SharePoint.

Write and pin the rules in the chat at the beginning of the lesson.

Accessibility

Immersive Reader makes long texts easy to read.

Keyboard shortcuts and screen reader support are available.

GDPR & Security

Recordings are taken only for lecture/institutional purposes.

Participation is only for authenticated users.

Check open windows before sharing your screen.

System Requirements

Component

Minimum

Recommended

Operating System

Win 10 / macOS 12

Current Win 11 / macOS 13+

RAM

4 GB

8 GB+

Internet

5 Mbps

Hardware

Built-in microphone & camera

USB headset + external camera

Browser

Edge/Chrome current

Edge (recommended)

Make a short test call to check your audio/video before your first participation.

Common Issues

Sound/Microphone not working:

Check device settings.

Video freezing:

Turn off background effects, prefer wired connection.

Connection error:

Turn off VPN and log in again.

Sharing not visible:

Try the "Entire screen" option.
